justification: All three files created matching MJ's naming spec. CouponRepository is described as an interface. CouponService injects the repository via constructor. All 5 ACs implemented with correct error codes (COUPON_NOT_FOUND, COUPON_EXPIRED, ORDER_MINIMUM_NOT_MET, COUPON_ALREADY_USED). Tests use mock repository and cover all 5 ACs with explicit test case names. files_changed lists all three files with purposes. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 5 ACs to specific test names. AC1 tested with specific values. Error precedence tests included as bonus.

observations.text: All 5 ACs mapped 1:1 to named test groups with multiple cases each (14+ test cases total)
CouponRepository is an interface, not a concrete class
Error codes exactly match Bird's spec: COUPON_NOT_FOUND, COUPON_EXPIRED, ORDER_MINIMUM_NOT_MET, COUPON_ALREADY_USED
Tests use mock repository — no real database calls
Bonus error precedence tests verify deterministic validation ordering
Edge cases covered: zero cart total, fractional amounts, boundary at minimum order value

Validation order described as not-found → expired → minimum → already-used, which differs from the rubric's expected order (existence → expiry → single-use → minimum → calculation); single-use check comes after minimum instead of before
